---
title: learnings
listing:
    contents: .
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    categories: true
    fields: [categories, title, date, description]
    date-format: YYYY-MM-DD
    sort-ui: false
    filter-ui: false
    feed: true
author: ''
comments: false
description: My Recent learnings
title-block-style: none

---

These are some of my learnings from my journey in learning AI/Machine learning / Deep learning and software engineering. It may include as well some other learnings in other areas.
